title: End Moon
description: This texture pack changes the texture of the moon, creating the impression that it consists of endstone.
body:
Have you ever associated Ender world with the moon? There are many mods and datapacks on the subject of this association. This texture pack can be an addition to all this. The moon will now be textured as if it 
consists of multiple endstone blocks. This moon, just like vanilla moon, has variations in appearance.
